title: German ruling declares Google liable for false answers in AI Overviews
summary: 德国法院裁定谷歌对其AI概览中的虚假回答负有责任，认为这些内容属于谷歌自身言论，而非第三方内容，因此谷歌需承担法律责任。
highlights: German ruling declares Google liable for false answers in AI Overviews
landmark German ruling declares Google's AI Overviews are Google's own words
makes it liable for false answers
